transcript.text:
[What a brilliant intro...]
[Hamburg (Salisbury steak)]
[Mullae-dong's pride: Godong Hamburg]
[Let's eat the whole menu...]
[Hamburg party]
Bon appetit~!
[A party of juiciness]
[Meat juice overload]
[It overflows...]
[Can't resist...]
I can't believe this
[Let's start this unbelievable mukbang!]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Mullae-dong, Yeongdeungpo-gu
This is where Netflix's 'Hellbound' ad was filmed at
[Video uploaded on 2021.12.06]

I had hamburg steak (salisbury steak) back then
And it was excellent
But I only got to eat a little
I came here today to try them all
It was their 1st-day opening
But now they're very popular
[Here!]
[Godong Hamburg] [Mullae-dong, Yeongdeungpo-gu]
Hello~
Order through the Kiosk
Owner: Hello, it's been a while
You even came out in my dream
-I came back because it was so delicious -Thank you
How many different hamburgs are there?
[Total of 6]
The dishes are here

Let's order everything
[Orders 7 including the burger]
As for the sides... They have fried soondae (pork blood sausage)
[Adding fried soondae]
Total of 8 items
Her acting deserves an Oscar Best Actress Award
[Lie detector activated...]
[That's a lie!]
I was starred for a split second
[Her back]
My son was laughing hysterically
He said he never knew that I can be so bad at acting
I came back here because the food was tasty
We were so happy that you enjoyed the meal that time
[Let's prepare it once again]
[Ggalmae Hamburg]

[Gosoon Katsu]
[Hamburg Pasta]
[Hyeja Burger]
[The meal is coming together 1 by 1]
[Complete]
Order #109
Thank you
For the dishes...
Godong Hamburg This is the one I had
This one is Ggalmae
This is Worldclass Hamburg
Gosoon Katsu
This one's the pasta Where's the Rosé
-Here's the Rosé Hamburg -Thank you
Hyeja Burger, and Fried Soondae
Bon appetit

A bite of the standard one first
Look at the juiciness
Can you see that?
It's oozing out
It's flowing out
Get some sauce on it
That might not be enough for Tzuyang
Will you be okay with just that?
-We'll make them bigger for you next time -Thank you
The meat juice is amazing
That's so good
The meat itself is excellent
The sauce as well Everything's good
Delicious
Next, Let's eat the fried foods first before they get soggy
The inside is not pork or chicken It's hamburg

It's hamburg meat, but fried like katsu (cutlet)
I love hamburg It's so good
Potato fries
Fried soondae here too
So crispy
They fried it
Fried soondae is always tasty
Ggalmae hamburg this time
It looks and sounds spicy
Is it going to be spicy? Let's try it first
Not that spicy!
This is perfect for those who like a little spice
It's really good
The sauce is amazing
Next
Hamburg Spaghetti

Cut it
Into small pieces
Like this
Roll up the noodles
It's like a cheese-oven spaghetti from the old days
Grab it like this
This one next
Worldclass hamburg?
It's a combination of Worldclass sauce and salad
I'll take a bite as a whole
A very thick cheddar cheese
It goes well with the strong cheese flavor
The sauce has a kick to it The spiciness is about the same as this one
The meat juice is dripping down
Get all the cheese on it
Now in 1 bite

Potato fries would go well with this too
I haven't had the Rosé yet
Right?
That juiciness
What?
An explosion
With lots of Rosé sauce
Tasty
It tastes good!
There's bread here So cute
Their mascot
[In half...]
Rosé~!
With bread
It's great with bread too!
I'll finish this

I want to eat the burger, but how?
Cover it,
This is wild
Stick this in
It was a catastrophe back at Gordon Ramsay Burger
[Video from 2022.01.11 Gordon Ramsay Burger]
You have to cut it with the stick inside
Yes, there you go The stick helps it cut in half
No, don't fall
Wait!
Cut this like this first
It's ruined...
Stick it
It's a tasty burger made with tasty hamburg meat
Cut the rest,
Lots of sauce

Get some spaghetti noodles
The juice is dripping down my chin
It's so juicy
This fits my taste more
So I'll eat this first Saving the best for last
I've been taking big bites Let's cut them smaller now
Ggalmae hamburg
Sounds like Halmae (grandma)
Sorry...
I love the Ggalmae sauce
Chicken feet? Beef ribs?
Similar sauce to those dishes
You have to eat the grapes inside
I ate all of them
Last Ggalmae
Potato fries!

I wonder how the fried soondae is now...
Still good
Even if they're cold!
Grab a lot
These are 250g each
[Then she ate a total of...]
1.7~1.8kg of hamburg steak
No wonder... They're big
Next,
Hamburg Katsu
Can't resist the hamburg katsu
For the burger... Let's cut it like this!
This will be better
Cut the meat in half And it's a smaller burger
I compliment myself
[TzuyangTV Mini Series: Behind the Hamburg Tower] This is a surgical glove

Scalpel
[Surgery complete]
[Yes, I think the surgery went well...!]
I'll just eat this with my hands
I give up
Just break it up
[The genre changes to horror...]
Last bite of the burger!
[Perfection]
[Applause]
You're incredible
It's difficult for women to even finish 1 hamburg steak
I love hamburg myself, but
1 of those is bigger than 1 serving of pork belly
[But she's someone that is out of logic]
[Cleared fried soondae]

I will eat the bread on my way home as a dessert
Thanks everyone
[I have to get this one film!]
I can't believe this
She's remarkable
[Received another thumbs-up today.. ^^] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
